levels.description: Community-maintained packs and registry entries published under public review guidelines. Suitable for experimentation, teaching, and forks. Does not assert third-party audit or legal certification.
levels.label: Community

levels.description: Maintainer-reviewed entries with documented checks, reproducible validators, and signed or attested release artefacts where applicable. Indicates process maturity, not a statutory seal of approval.
levels.label: Enterprise

levels.description: Entries that pass extended review, compatibility checks against interchange versions, and documented evidence expectations. Still documentation-oriented; operators remain responsible for deployment context.
levels.label: Verified

summary: Documentation-oriented certification levels for GovAI registry and marketplace metadata. These levels describe review depth and trust packaging expectations; they do not replace hosted audit verdicts or legal compliance determinations.
